description: CompositionFull sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has black and white stripes with blue and grey accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, embroidered seal on the left chest, embroidered lettering on the right chest, full length buttoned placket with glass look second button, cuffs with snap buttons and snap button on the elbow area, brand name appliqued on the bottom of the facing placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  charcoal black striped shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
